creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Joe,

many thanks for this extjs update.
However, I have a doubt regarding the plist entries that you added with
this release: I see several entries belonging to a .sass-cache directory
and I wanted to make sure with you that those are absolutely necessary.

Could you confirm that we indeed need those cache entries or if not,
could you please send a followup without them?

Thanks,
Frederic (culot@)
